programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Get Your Goat; Pups Save the Crop Circles
programs.desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin, Francois, observe a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes; Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, so he calls on the "Paw Patrol" to find out who is making them.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino
programs.desc: Mayor Humdinger and his Kitties go to Dino Wilds for Dino acting lessons but somehow find themselves bound for Adventure Bay.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save a Flamingo Dancer; Pups Save a Mayor and Her Mini
programs.desc: The PAW Patrol searches for Julia, Julius, and a flamingo when they go missing from a dance contest; the PAW Patrol comes to the rescue when Mayor Goodway and her niece Julia get stuck on a runaway art installation.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.sub_title: The Big Announcement; Being Babies; Mr. Cat's Cafe; Folk Music Band; Staying up Late
programs.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig have big news to tell Peppa and George; Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies; Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr. Cat's Cafe; Peppa and George listen to Granny's friends play folk music.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save Hummy Mummy's New Home; Pups Save Adventure Bakes
programs.desc: A pair of alligators take Mayor Humdinger's mother, Helga Humdinger, on a wild ride across Foggy Bottom!; Winnie Winnington is determined to beat Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta in a cooking competition to find Adventure Bay's best bakers.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Sporting Goods Store; The Crew Plays Construction Vehicle Soccer
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.
